'''√t-k-sh''' ('''takasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cunnilingue|cunnilingue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cunnilingue|cunnilingue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √t-k-sh
|-
! Lemma
| takasha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || takashithi || takashiji || takashishi || takashi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || takashuthuth || takashujuj || takashushush || takash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || takashuthu || takashuju || takashushu || takashu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || takashufuth || takashufuj || takashufush || takashuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || takashethe || takasheje || takasheshe || takashe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || takashothoth || takashojoj || takashoshosh || takash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || takashotho || takashojo || takashosho || takasho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || takashofoth || takashofoj || takashofosh || takashof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || takashïf || takashïf || takashïf || takashïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || takashïfïf || takashïfïf || takashïfïf || takashïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || takashïf || takashïf || takashïf || takashïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || takashïf || takashïf || takashïf || takashïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || takashæthæ || takashæjæ || takashæshæ || takashæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || takashathath || takashajaj || takashashash || takash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || takashatha || takashaja || takashasha || takasha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || takashafath || takashafaj || takashafash || takashaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || takashasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gotakashasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokitakashasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || takashnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gotakashnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokitakashnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || takashshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gotakashnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokitakashshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || takashroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gotakashnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokitakashroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || takashmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gotakashnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokitakashmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || takashsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gotakashnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokitakashsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || takashngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gotakashnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokitakashngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || takashyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gotakashnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokitakashyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || takashyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gotakashnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokitakashyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || takashnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gotakashnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokitakashnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || takashnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gotakashnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitakashnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || takashnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gotakashnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakashnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || takashshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gotakashnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokitakashshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || takashshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gotakashnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitakashshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || takashshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gotakashnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakashshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || takashronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gotakashnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokitakashronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || takashroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gotakashnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokitakashroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || takashromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gotakashnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakashromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || takashmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gotakashnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokitakashmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || takashmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gotakashnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokitakashmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || takashmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gotakashnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitakashmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || takash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || tækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hotakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hotækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohotakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohotækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nütakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nütækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünütakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünütækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïtakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïtækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïtakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïtækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lutakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lutækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulutakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulutækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || litakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || litækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilitakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilitækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kotakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kotækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokotakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokotækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || ketakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || ketækæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || keketakash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || keketækæsh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
